rationale: Captures the count of `(window as any)` casts at the start of Phase C so the rewire's progress is auditable. Every sub-phase that rewires a panel through `runtime.persistence.*` is expected to drop the count; `scripts/track-window-cast-count.mjs` fails the build if the count rises above this baseline.
notes: Phase D (sync + workspace rewire) and Phase E (AI + plugin rewire) will continue to drop this number; the baseline file is updated only when a phase completes (per S70 ratchet pattern).

Wave 5 (2026-04-30): Eliminated all 777 `(window as any)` casts from src/ui/ (96 files). Created src/types/global-window.d.ts with 157 typed Window properties. Remaining 1,343 casts are in src/engine/, src/tools/, src/rendering/, and other engine-layer subsystems — scheduled for Wave 6/7 subsystem sweeps.
